programmes.show_description: Based in County Durham Crafter's Companion strives to create products to make crafting easier, more enjoyable, and beautifully rewarding. Tune in to find out what's new!
Keith is back with his unique blend of quality, quantity and fun! Make the most of your all day P&P of only £4.95 and fill your baskets!

HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
...Month: Stuart Hillard is going to be launching his April Block of the Month.
...Garden Quilt: Delphine Brooks is going to be launching the brand new Riley Blake Jennifer Long Garden Spools Quilt kit.
...Stuart Hillard: Stuart's Lewis & Irene Porcelain and Sea Glass fabric collection is back in stock, get it whilst stock's last.
Delphine Brooks is back demonstrating new Cross Stitch kits from Meloca Designs.
The Brother FS250ME is back in stock alongside a fantastic deal on the Innov-is NV1150.
Join Paul for a Creative Groovi Hour! Watch as he crafts beautiful parchment designs using the Groovi system - perfect for adding a personal touch to your handmade projects.
One of the most exciting brands in UK craft today, Jamie Rodgers Crafts aim is to inspire with his products, ideas and techniques! Always good value and quality.
Don't miss the Brother Masterclass - packed with incredible offers on top-quality machines and must-have accessories for every maker!
